title: Task outcome: 사용자가 제공한 RAG 관련 자료를 anchor-only 상태에서 검증 완료 지식으로 승격한다. 외부 RAG 문서/논문/공식 문서를 실제 확인하고, 10개 하위 에이전트가
summary: Directly opened the user-supplied RAG methodology links, used 10 subagents for focused review and purity filtering, promoted the material into a verified RAG knowledge pack, updated source chunks/provenance from anchor-only to verified_summary, rebuilt wiki/SQLite indexes, and verified live DinoBrain search can retrieve the new knowledge pack.
claim: Task outcome for DinoBrain: Directly opened the user-supplied RAG methodology links, used 10 subagents for focused review and purity filtering, promoted the material into a verified RAG knowledge pack, updated source chunks/provenance from anchor-only to verified_summary, rebuilt wiki/SQLite indexes, and verified live DinoBrain search can retrieve the new knowledge pack.
request: 사용자가 제공한 RAG 관련 자료를 anchor-only 상태에서 검증 완료 지식으로 승격한다. 외부 RAG 문서/논문/공식 문서를 실제 확인하고, 10개 하위 에이전트가 영역별 학습 내용을 상호검증/비교한 뒤, 순도 높은 source/chunk/claim knowledge로 정제하여 DinoBrain data repo에 저장하고 검증/푸시한다.
decisions: Treat exact user-provided RAG URLs as directly verified summary sources, not merely anchor-only backlog.
Do not store raw full external pages; store bounded paraphrased claims with source URLs and provenance links.
Accept core RAG, hybrid retrieval, reranking, source/chunk/claim lineage, GraphRAG overlay, and evaluation guidance into DinoBrain memory.
Hold paper/provider-specific claims unless source-bound and refreshed; reject overgeneralizations such as RAG guaranteeing truth or lexical fallback equaling dense hybrid retrieval.
Keep current live retrieval mode labeled lexical_fallback_v2 until a real embedding provider is configured.
next_steps: Add retrieval canaries for synonym recall, Korean-English mixed queries, provenance-required answers, stale-memory rejection, and memory-on vs memory-off behavior.
Implement or configure a real dense embedding provider before claiming live dense hybrid retrieval.
Address graph-health warning accepted_instance_source_mapping_missing in a later provenance-mapping pass.

evidence.snippet: Directly opened the user-supplied RAG methodology links, used 10 subagents for focused review and purity filtering, promoted the material into a verified RAG knowledge pack, updated source chunks/provenance from anchor-only to verified_summary, rebuilt wiki/SQLite indexes, and verified live DinoBrain search can retrieve the new knowledge pack.

review_notes: Auto-held legacy unreviewed generated memory so it stays out of hot retrieval until lineage is manually confirmed.
